runs.notes: Knowledge Inbox and dual-memory foundation passed isolated smoke tests, full pytest, Ruff, mypy, store lint, dashboard startup, and MCP startup/process_inbox validation.

Owner-live Knowledge Inbox validation passed on the main store. One Markdown file in inbox/ created a source-provenanced Knowledge record; no Experience record was created from ingestion; CLI and in-process MCP retrieval returned the Knowledge in a later isolated context; unified retrieval separated Relevant Knowledge from Relevant Experience; unrelated query returned no match. A small .gitkeep inbox control-file bug was fixed, covered by regression test, and the accidental .gitkeep Knowledge record was invalidated append-only.

checks.owner_live_validation: passed: Markdown source processed through process-inbox on main store
checks.owner_live_knowledge_provenance: passed: source filename, SHA-256 hash, source type, line location, extractor metadata, and provenance preserved
checks.owner_live_mcp_retrieval: passed: in-process MCP query_knowledge and query_memory returned expected separated results
checks.owner_live_unrelated_query: passed: unrelated clinical query returned no Knowledge or Experience match
checks.inbox_control_files: fixed: dotfiles such as .gitkeep are skipped; accidental .gitkeep Knowledge record invalidated append-only
checks.knowledge_inbox_smoke: passed: Markdown/TXT, JSON, XLSX, duplicate, unsupported binary
checks.dashboard_inbox_knowledge: passed: AppTest rendered Inbox and Knowledge views
checks.mcp_process_inbox: passed: MCP startup, process_inbox, and query_memory
checks.unified_retrieval: passed: separated Knowledge and Experience sections
checks.dashboard_startup: passed: Streamlit health endpoint returned ok
checks.mcp_startup: passed: in-process tool listing and process_inbox smoke
